content.full_text:
March 7, 1985

Honorable Arthur Marshall  
606 South Olive St., Ste. 1900  
Los Angeles, CA 90014  

Re: Our File No. A-85-059  

Dear Judge Marshall:

This letter will confirm the telephone advice you received last month regarding your Statement of Economic Interests. You had asked whether you must disclose an investment in a private pension plan.

Government Code Section 82030 excludes from the definition of "income" payments received under a defined benefit pension plan qualified under Internal Revenue Code Section 401(a). The Commission staff has concluded that such pension plans are also not reportable as investments.

I hope this information is helpful. Please let me know if I can be of further assistance.

Sincerely,

Carla J. Wardlow  
Political Reform Consultant
